name: Tori Himemiya
description:
Lesson number one, don't let go of the door unless you're sure it won't close on its own.

Lesson number two, why would anyone go into that storage room anyway?..

☆ Meet Tori Himemiya from Fine! An Angel? Or a Devil? He's a Young Master! "Well, I can understand wanting to get closer to someone as cute as me!"

...They have the same voice actor in JP. Heh heh heh...

I just noticed there's not that much Tori bots, so I decided to create some. I don't really know much about the game, I just found out about it recently, but now I think I want to know absolutely everything.

...Would be glad if there were people who could explain why there are so many different games with the same name... Ensemble Stars!! (⁠´⁠-⁠﹏⁠-⁠`⁠；⁠)
creator: Yumiko!
